caption: A man wearing a grey blazer over a white shirt and a dark tie stands on a stage, speaking in front of a large digital presentation screen. The screen displays a title, "INDUSTRIAL MACHINE LEARNING," followed by "HORIZONTALLY SCALABLE DATA PIPELINES WITH AIRFLOW." Below this, it lists his titles: "CTO Exponential Technologies," "Chairman The Institute for Ethical AI & ML," "Member, Broader AI Expert Group European Commission," and "Advisory group TeensinAI." A photo of the man is also on the slide above his name, "Alejandro Saucedo." At the bottom of the screen, text reads, "CONTACT ME AT: A@E-X.10." The lower banner of the presentation displays the "europython" logo and the text "Edinburgh 23 29 July 2018." Across the sequence, the man remains in a similar position, gesturing slightly with his hands while presenting. The visual content on the screen remains constant throughout.
